Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Powell's Successor as Fed Chair** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]

President Donald Trump announced on January 30, 2026, that he will nominate former Fed Governor **Kevin Warsh** to replace **Jerome Powell** as Federal Reserve Chair, with Powell's term ending in May 2026[1][2]. Warsh, a 2006-2011 Fed veteran from the 2008 crisis, edged out contenders like Kevin Hassett
